授業方法: Various methods including, pair and group work, listening exercises, dialog construction and presentation.Each class will consist of various speaking and listening skills, pair work and group activities.  Creating and writing theme-based dialogs and presenting them will also be included.  The class is conducted face to face.

第1回:
【Startup Week】      【Flex Hours】       "Online class（On-demand format）"   《30分》
《30 minutes》　　　
Orientation, rules and regulations, class format, short self-introductions   Assignment:  Write a 200 plus word self-introduction essay and bring to class next week.

https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=ad18e90e-7703-46d6-9191-b3ee008528a8
Review rules and regulations, 45 minutes of study
第2回:
【Core Weeks 1】       "Face-to-face class"        
《90 minutes》　　　             
advice for studying English,  group interview chart, follow-up questions
Review of class introduction and related questions. One hour of out of class preparation
第3回:
【Core Weeks 2】       "Face-to-face class"          《90 minutes》　　　
            
Text Unit 1 "Greetings" first time meetings, key expressions, the handshake
Summary worksheet of first meetings. One hour of out of class study.
第4回:
【Core Weeks 3】        "Face-to-face class"       《90 minutes》　　　
　　　　　　
Text Unit 1 "Greetings" continued, listening comprehensions drills, extend the dialog exercises
Writing related dialogs of in-class study. One hour of study.
第5回:
【Core Weeks 4】        "Face-to-face class"       《90 minutes》　　　
　　　　　　
Text Unit 2 "Likes and Dislikes" Collecting Data chart, pair work gap exercise,
Pair dialog about likes and dislikes. One hour or more of out of class study.
第6回:
【Core Weeks 5】        "Face-to-face class"       《90 minutes》　　　
                   
Text Unit 2 "Likes and Dislikes" continued, continue the sentence, commenting positively and negatively to suggestions
Research of examples of stating opinions. One hour of study.
第7回:
【Flex Hours】        "Online class（On-demand format）"　        　　 《90 minutes》　　　
    
Research project:   Interview a foreign exchange student
Key points of your interview, One hour or more of study.
第8回:
【Core Weeks 6】        "Face-to-face class"         《90 minutes》　　　　　
　　　　　
Text Unit 3 "Times and Dates" simple present tense, listening comprehension exercises
Time schedule worksheet homework assignment. One hour of out of class study.
第9回:
【Core Weeks 7】        "Face-to-face class"     《90 minutes》　　　
            
Text Unit 3 "Times and Dates" continued, your schedule, pair work time exchange, key expressions
Begin presentation writing. One hour or more of study.
第10回:
【Core Weeks 8】 　　    "Face-to-face class"      《90 minutes》　　　
              
Practical Situation Dialog Construction and presentations, topics to be announced
Critique of presentation worksheet. 45 minutes of study.
第11回:
【Core Weeks 9】      "Face-to-face class"       《90 minutes》　　　

Text Unit4 "About Yesterday" past tense, writing: paragraph construction, exchange and edit
Review and opinion of the in-class study. One hour of study.
第13回:
【Core Weeks 10】　　     "Face-to-face class"      《90 minutes》　　　
　　　　　　　　　
Text Unit 5 "Family" describing appearance and personality, pair work gap exercise, listening comprehension drills
Essay: Family arrangements in a cultural context. One hour or more of out of class study.
第14回:
【Flex Hours】        "Online class（On-demand format）"　        　　 《90 minutes》　　　
    
Research project:   Interview a foreign exchange student
Research: Japan's declining population.　Exam study、one hour or more of study.
第15回:
【Core Weeks 11】　　         "Face-to-face class"       《90 minutes》　　　
               
Text Unit 5 "Family" continued, extend the dialogs, making a family tree, Exam explanation and practice
Preparing for the holiday. Ideal vacations. One hour of study.
トピック.授業外学習2: Students would be advised to do as much personal study outside the classroom as possible.  Also, to submit any homework assignments on time.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
